differentials.name: S/P thyroid surgery DDx:  esophageal activity from salivary excretion
differentials.raw: S/P thyroid surgery DDx:  esophageal activity from salivary excretion (disappears after glass of water)

context: =  distal remnant of thyroid descent tract Thyroid Calcifications (a)  microcalcifications = psammoma bodies √  punctate hyperechoic foci without acoustic shadowing (b)  large coarse calcifications = tissue necrosis √  spicules / fragmented plates / granular deposit within fibrous septa with posterior acoustic shadowing ◊  Common in multinodular goiter + medullary cancer ◊  Associated with 75% malignancy rate in solitary nodule (c)  peripheral calcifications √  alignment along periphery of lesion ◊  Common in multinodular goiter ± malignancy Psammoma Bodies =  10-100 µm round crystalline calci
